code:
import io
import string

fn second_token(_ line: String) -> Option<String>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut state = 0
  mut start = -1
  mut stop = -1
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(c)
      let is_ws = c == 32 or c == 9
      if state == 0 and not is_ws
        state = 1
      else if state == 1 and is_ws
        state = 2
      else if state == 2 and not is_ws
        state = 3
        start = i
      else if state == 3 and is_ws
        stop = i
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
    if not done
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  if start < 0
    None
  else
    let actual_stop = if stop < 0
      n
    else
      stop
    end
    Some(string.substring(line, start, actual_stop))
  end
end

mut total = 0
mut eof = false
while not eof
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    if string.len(line) > 0
      match second_token(line)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          total = total + v
        when None
          let _ignore = 0
        end
      when None
        let _ignore = 0
      end
    end
  when None
    eof = true
  end
end
println("sum=#{total}")
